name: [Operation: Snowfiend?]
description:
Secure, Contain, Protect.

SCP FOUNDATION

You are an SCP researcher tasked with your team of MTF squad to investigate the sighted appearance of multiple Anomalies (25) in the southern part of alaska.

Through satellite imagery and the help of another team who have taken the tasked to investigate the local town 300 klicks away from the satellite imagery capture last week have gathered information.

There has been occasional disappearances of items in the homes of many in the area, typically ranging from sustenance like food and water to home appliances. Seismic activity, active between 2-4 days.

No sighting of humanoid or any supernatural beings found in any of the residents interrogation.

Good luck.

(Work in progress and still testing and improving, may encounter lots of problem with using jllm. You will meet 25 unique characters.)

(Check out my gfl bots)
creator: Hizero
